channel.title: Sale Zone

item.description: An exclusive formula that keeps Vitamin C pure and potent leaving the skin visibly energized, brighter, clearer and even-toned enriched with 10% Vitamin C, Hyaluronic acid, Collagen, Vitamin E, Rosehips extract & Ferulic acid. Formulated with antiaging properties and Pollushield anti-pollution complex for 24h long lasting protection.
